summary: A personal memory/scrapbook app featuring Quotes & Fun Facts, Our Memories photo gallery, and Doraemon-themed home page with interactive audio and background music.
architectural_notes: App uses audio assets: Doremon_theme (BGM), VID_20260301_052016.MP4 (click sound), VID_20260301_052623.MP4 (Our Memories section sound)

existing_features.title: On the Quotes & Fun Facts page (QuotesPage.tsx), ensure that every full page refresh loads a freshly randomised quote and fun fact automatically — without requiring the user to click the refresh button. The random selection must differ from the previous value on each reload.
In OurMemoriesPage.tsx, remove the 6th image (index 5, zero-based) from the curated photo array so that gallery only shows the remaining photos.

Add continuous background BGM using the file 'Doremon_theme' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/Doremon_theme) that starts playing automatically when the user is on the Home / Dashboard page and stops (or pauses) when they navigate away from it. The music should loop and play at a comfortable default volume.

On the Home / Dashboard page, attach a click handler to the central Doraemon image so that clicking it plays the audio file 'VID_20260301_052016.MP4' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/VID_20260301_052016.MP4). The sound should play from the start on each click.

Play the audio file 'VID_20260301_052623.MP4' (served from frontend/public/assets/audio/VID_20260301_052623.MP4) automatically when the user navigates to the Our Memories page (OurMemoriesPage.tsx). The sound should play once on page entry and stop when the user leaves the page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Quotes & Fun Facts section should show new/random content on every refresh
Remove the 6th picture from the Our Memories section
Add background BGM (Doremon_theme) that plays continuously on the Home page
Play sound VID_20260301_052016.MP4 when the Doraemon image at the centre of the Home page is clicked
Play sound VID_20260301_052623.MP4 when navigating to the Our Memories section
